## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for AI Content Manager role at Panzer, discussing candidate's experience and role expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kavishka has extensive experience with AI-driven content creation and SEO, including work with Marcel at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Panzer uses Atlas, an advanced version of AirOps, for content pipeline management](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Role involves managing 15-20 pieces of content weekly, iterating on workflows, and ensuring quality output](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Onboarding process includes 2-3 weeks of role-specific training and a test project](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

## Topics

### Kavishka's Background and Experience

  - [Started as a copywriter, transitioned to SEO and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Worked with Marcel at DeepGram, increasing organic traffic by 20x](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Experienced in various aspects of digital marketing, including paid media, analytics, and growth](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

### Content Automation and Workflow Management

  - [Used Airtable, AirOps, and Zapier for content workflows at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Implemented multi-step processes for content creation, including research, outlining, writing, and quality checks](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Developed automation for content updates and version management](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of human oversight in the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Quality Assurance and Iteration

  - [Conducts test runs of 5-10 dummy articles to identify areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Iterates on workflows based on output quality and efficiency gains](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Balances time constraints with thorough quality checks](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Emphasizes importance of validation when working with LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

### Panzer's Content Pipeline (Atlas)

  - [Advanced version of AirOps with more sophisticated features](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Pipeline includes steps like assignment creation, research, outlining, drafting, fact-checking, and metadata generation](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Allows for customization and iteration of workflows based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Integrates with SEMrush API for keyword research and SERP analysis](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)

### Role Expectations and KPIs

  - [Initially responsible for 5-10 pieces of content per week, scaling up to 15-20](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Focus on efficient content generation and quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Expected to iterate on workflows and suggest improvements](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Collaborate with engineering team to implement new features and optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

## Next Steps

  - Panzer team to review Kavishka's candidacy and provide feedback
  - [If selected, Kavishka to begin 2-3 week onboarding process, including company and role-specific training](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Kavishka to familiarize himself with Atlas platform and current content pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Prepare for test project to demonstrate proficiency and identify areas for improvement in current workflows](https://fathom.video/share/5sMsw536zsXUSzoY5Jzvy3etzXKpRGrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
